label: API Endpoint (POST)
description: Start an execution when an HTTP POST request arrives at a project-specific URL. Declare the expected body fields as output ports; the node extracts each from the request body at fire time.

outputs.name: receivedAt
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the request arrived.

fields.label: Path
fields.description: Optional route suffix appended under `/w/{token}/`. Leave empty for the bare token URL.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Optional. If set, the incoming request must include this key in the X-API-Key header.

then.message: ApiPost '{id}' path starts with '/'. The dispatcher prefixes the route automatically; drop the leading slash.
